member.summary: An objective belonging to a Quest. Requirement and progress are keyed by game id (e.g. ODOOM, OQUAKE). Title/Description are authored text. ProgressSummary is always computed from requirement + progress dictionaries.

member.summary: Completion percentage 0–100 from requirement vs progress dictionaries. Updated when progress is applied.

member.summary: Optional GeoHotSpot to associate with this objective (visit or trigger).

member.summary: Optional URI for cross-app handoff (next step outside current game).

member.name: P:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.ONODE.Core.Holons.Objective.ProgressSummary
member.summary: Computed progress text from Need* + progress dictionaries.

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.ONODE.Core.Holons.Objective.BuildProgressSummaryString
member.summary: Builds the human-readable progress summary from Need* + progress dictionaries (e.g. Killed 1/10 monsters in ODOOM (10%)).

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.ONODE.Core.Holons.Objective.EnsureAuthoredStringsFromComputedProgress
member.summary: Backfill only: when persisted data still has no authored strings (e.g. rows created before MetaData deserialize used case-insensitive binding). Prefer fixing load path so and hydrate from storage.

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.ONODE.Core.Holons.Objective.InvalidateObjectiveString
member.summary: Call after modifying any requirement dictionary so ProgressSummary is recomputed.

member.summary: Clears all progress dictionaries (Collected, Killed, Earnt, time/level progress, etc.) and completion fields. Does not modify any Need* requirement dictionaries.

member.name: T:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.ONODE.Core.Holons.QuestObjectiveProgressDictionaryHelper
member.summary: Clears only progress properties; leaves Need* unchanged.

member.name: T:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.ONODE.Core.Managers.COSMICManager
member.summary: COSMICManager exposes the full COSMIC ORM / Omniverse object model to the WEB4 OASIS API. It provides strongly-typed Create/Read/Update/Delete and rich Get X For Y operations for all CelestialBodies and CelestialSpaces defined in the STAR ontology.

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.ONODE.Core.Managers.COSMICManager.SearchChildrenForParentAsync(System.String,NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Interfaces.IHolon,NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Enums.HolonType)
member.summary: Performs a nested (recursive) search for all children of the given holon type under the specified parent, walking the full graph (children, grandchildren, etc.) and filtering by the supplied search term (Name/Description for now).

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.ONODE.Core.Managers.COSMICManager.SearchChildrenForParentAsync(System.String,System.Guid,NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Enums.HolonType,NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Enums.HolonType)
member.summary: Overload that takes a parentId and loads the parent holon before performing the nested search.

Searches for holons of the given type anywhere in the Omniverse, optionally scoped to a parentId. This wraps the core COSMICManagerBase.SearchHolonsAsync helper and exposes it as a public API using the standard OASISResult wrapper so other layers (web API, CLI, etc) have a consistent interface.
Non-async wrapper variant of SearchHolonsForParentAsync.

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.ONODE.Core.Managers.COSMICManager.SaveOmniverseAsync(NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Interfaces.STAR.IOmiverse)
member.summary: Saves the specified Omniverse instance using the underlying STAR implementation. The concrete Omniverse object must be created by the caller (in the STAR project) and passed in via the IOmiverse interface.

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.ONODE.Core.Managers.COSMICManager.AddMultiverseAsync(NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Interfaces.STAR.IOmiverse,NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Interfaces.STAR.IMultiverse)
member.summary: Adds a Multiverse to an existing Omniverse. The concrete Multiverse is created in the STAR project and passed in via the IMultiverse interface.

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.ONODE.Core.Managers.COSMICManager.AddUniverseAsync(NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Interfaces.STAR.IMultiverse,NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Interfaces.STAR.IUniverse)
member.summary: Adds a Universe to an existing Multiverse using the existing STAR GrandSuperStar core API where available, otherwise falls back to saving the Universe directly.

Creates a complete Galaxy hierarchy: Universe -> GalaxyCluster -> Galaxy using the supplied STAR instances. The caller is responsible for constructing the concrete STAR classes and wiring any additional properties; this helper wires parents and persists them using the existing Add*Async methods.

Creates a full SolarSystem hierarchy inside an existing Galaxy: Galaxy -> SolarSystem (with central Star) -> Planet -> optional Moons. The caller constructs the concrete STAR instances; this helper wires parents and saves them in the correct order using the Add*Async APIs.

Creates a full SolarSystem hierarchy inside an existing Galaxy with a central Star and a collection of Planets (each with optional Moons). This is a higher-level convenience wrapper over AddSolarSystemAsync, AddPlanetAsync and AddMoonAsync.
member.param: The parent Galaxy that will own the new SolarSystem.
The central Star for the SolarSystem.
A collection of tuples where each entry contains a Planet and an optional collection of its Moons.

member.summary: Creates a full SolarSystem hierarchy inside an existing Galaxy with a central Star and a collection of Planets (without specifying Moons). This is a convenience overload that wraps CreateSolarSystemWithPlanetsAsync and assumes no Moons for the supplied Planets.

Creates a Universe with its initial GalaxyClusters and Galaxies: Multiverse -> Universe -> GalaxyClusters -> Galaxies. This uses AddUniverseAsync, AddGalaxyClusterAsync and AddGalaxyAsync under the hood.
member.param: The Multiverse that will own the new Universe.
A collection of tuples where each entry contains a GalaxyCluster and its Galaxies.

member.summary: Creates a Multiverse under an Omniverse and populates it with one or more Universes. This is a convenience wrapper over AddMultiverseAsync and AddUniverseAsync.
member.param: The Omniverse that will own the new Multiverse.
The Universes to add to the Multiverse (e.g. MagicVerse, parallel universes, etc.).

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.ONODE.Core.Managers.COSMICManager.CreateUniverseWithChildrenAsync(NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Interfaces.STAR.IMultiverse,NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Interfaces.STAR.IUniverse,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a Universe with its full child hierarchy while preserving the cyberspace ontology. Creates: Universe -> GalaxyCluster -> Galaxy -> SolarSystem -> Star -> Planet -> Moon
Creates a Multiverse with its full child hierarchy while preserving the cyberspace ontology. Creates: Multiverse -> Universe -> GalaxyCluster -> Galaxy -> SolarSystem -> Star -> Planet -> Moon

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.ONODE.Core.Managers.COSMICManager.CreateGalaxyWithChildrenAsync(NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Interfaces.STAR.IGalaxyCluster,NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Interfaces.STAR.IGalaxy,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a Galaxy with its full child hierarchy while preserving the cyberspace ontology. Creates: Galaxy -> SolarSystem -> Star -> Planet -> Moon

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.ONODE.Core.Managers.COSMICManager.CreateSolarSystemWithChildrenAsync(NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Interfaces.STAR.IGalaxy,NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Interfaces.STAR.ISolarSystem,NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Interfaces.STAR.IStar,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a SolarSystem with its full child hierarchy while preserving the cyberspace ontology. Creates: SolarSystem -> Star -> Planet -> Moon

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.ONODE.Core.Managers.COSMICManager.CreatePlanetWithChildrenAsync(NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Interfaces.STAR.ISolarSystem,NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Interfaces.STAR.IPlanet,System.Boolean,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a Planet with its child Moons while preserving the cyberspace ontology. Creates: Planet -> Moon(s)

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.ONODE.Core.Managers.COSMICManager.CreateStarWithChildrenAsync(NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Interfaces.STAR.ISolarSystem,NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.Core.Interfaces.STAR.IStar,System.Boolean,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a Star with its child Planets (and their Moons) while preserving the cyberspace ontology. Creates: Star -> Planet(s) -> Moon(s)

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.ONODE.Core.Managers.QuestManager.PromoteQuestMetaDataToProperties(NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.ONODE.Core.Holons.Quest)
member.summary: Promote MetaData to strongly-typed Quest properties so API returns quests with Objectives (and Status) populated on first load. Status: prefer "Status" (HolonManager.MapMetaData), fallback "QuestStatus". Objectives: deserialize MetaData["Objectives"] JSON when the quest has no objectives yet; if still empty, synthesize from child holons.

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.ONODE.Core.Managers.QuestManager.DeserializeObjectivesFromMetaDataJsonString(System.String)
member.summary: Deserialize persisted Objectives array from MetaData; JSON matches (Title, Description, ProgressSummary, dictionaries).

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.ONODE.Core.Managers.QuestManager.CanStartQuestAsync(System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Returns whether the avatar can start the quest (quest is NotStarted and any MetaData PrerequisiteQuestIds are completed). ParentQuestId is for sub-quests/objectives only, not prerequisites.

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.ONODE.Core.Managers.QuestManager.StartQuestAsync(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.String)
member.summary: Starts a quest for the specified avatar. Validates prerequisites: if the quest has PrerequisiteQuestIds in MetaData, those quests must be completed first. (ParentQuestId is used for sub-quests/objectives; when all are complete the parent is marked complete.)

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.ONODE.Core.Managers.QuestManager.CompleteQuestObjectiveAsync(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.Guid,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Completes a quest objective. Uses Quest.Objectives (Option B) first; falls back to child Quests for backward compatibility.

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.ONODE.Core.Managers.QuestManager.OrderIncompleteObjectivesForProgress(System.Collections.Generic.IList{NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.ONODE.Core.Holons.Objective},System.Nullable{System.Guid})
member.summary: Incomplete objectives in apply order: first if present on the quest, then by and Id. Same ordering intent as STAR client MergeQuestProgressIntoLocalCache.

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.ONODE.Core.Managers.QuestManager.ApplyQuestProgressAsync(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.String,NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.ONODE.Core.Managers.QuestProgressDelta)
member.summary: Applies in-game progress (kills, pickups, XP, level time) to the quest's incomplete objectives. Updates progress dictionaries; completes objectives when thresholds are met; completes the quest when all objectives are done. Objectives are processed in order (active objective first when is set); every incomplete row receives the delta bundle and only applies matching Need* fields (same idea as the STAR client merge).

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.ONODE.Core.Managers.QuestManager.ResetObjectiveProgressAsync(System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Clears every embedded objective’s progress dictionaries and quest-level progress; does not change Need* requirements. Resets completion flags and 0% approx; if the quest was Completed, sets status back to InProgress.

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.ONODE.Core.Managers.QuestManager.ObjectiveApproximatePercent(NextGenSoftware.OASIS.API.ONODE.Core.Holons.Objective)
member.summary: Rough completion 0–99 for one objective from requirement vs progress dicts.

member.summary: Resolve which game key in a need dict matches the incoming (ODOOM vs Doom, OQUAKE vs Quake).

member.summary: True if this objective has at least one Need* row resolvable for (avoids vacuous completion when all OkNeed branches are "no requirement").
